title: fraxinus suaveolens
intro: Fraxinus suaveolens, also known as the Fragrant Ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Fraxinus suaveolens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
